frontmatter.title: Runtime Engine
frontmatter.description: Internal engine: Memory, Sessions, and Tools

html:
Runtime Engine

The Runtime Engine is the heart of LoongClaw, managing how it processes information, remembers past interactions, and uses tools.

In this section:

  • Memory: Understand how LoongClaw persists state and recalls information.
  • Sessions: Learn how multiple chat contexts are managed independently.
  • Tools: Extend LoongClaw's capabilities with built-in shell, file, and web tools.
